title: neomammillaria carretii
intro: Neomammillaria carretii, also known as the Carretii pincushion cactus, is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family, characterized by its small, round stems covered in fine, sharp spines. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Neomammillaria carretii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared for herbal use by drying the stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal purposes.
